headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on CME Group, Raises Price Target to $362
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $340 to $362.

headline: Did BMO's Tokenized Cash and AI Push Just Redefine Bank of Montreal's (TSX:BMO) Investment Narrative?
summary: In early April 2026, Bank of Montreal announced and completed several fixed-income offerings, including multiple callable senior and unsecured notes across maturities from 2027 to 2038 in US$ and HK$, while also appointing new leadership in equity capital markets and wealth management. The bank is pairing this funding activity and leadership refresh with a new AI and quantum institute and a planned tokenized cash platform with CME Group and Google Cloud, underscoring a push to modernize both...
